holdings.infoBox: BESF is an equity ETF with a total of 22 individual holdings. The top holdings are First American Government Obligations Fund Class X stock at 13.41%, NextDecade at 8.82%, Cheniere Energy at 5.45%, The Williams Companies at 5.18%, and ONEOK at 5.10%.

overview.description: The Bastion Energy ETF (BESF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in energy equity. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation through active management of a narrow portfolio of US energy stocks. The fund aims to focus on well-managed, undervalued companies. BESF was launched on Jun 3, 2025 and is issued by Bastion.
